per_question.question_text: The role involves a lot of ad-hoc analysis. Can you tell me about the main difference between an INNER JOIN and a LEFT JOIN and when you'd choose one over the other for a quick data pull?

Initial answer:
The main difference between inner join and left join is the type of record they return and inner join returns only those records that are matching values in both tables. For example if I have a customer table and an order table and I want to

Final continuation:
द main difference between inner joint and left join is the type of record they return. And inner join returns only those records that are matching values in both Board Tables. For example if I have a customer table and an order table. And I want to see only customer who placed order. I would use an inner joint. Left Chain on the other hand returns all records from the Left Left Table and only matching record from the right tables. If there is no match in the right table it returns null values. For पर quick analyze I Choose Inner Join when I only need matching records, Left Join. When I want to identify missing relationship ठीक है। Such as customer without order और product with no sales। So that That's it about inner join and left join. हां

per_question.question_text: In your internship at KAS Marine, your resume states you contributed to a '5% improvement in fuel efficiency recommendations.' Can you walk me through the exact analysis you performed? What specific data points did you use, what was your methodology, and how did you link your findings directly to that 5% figure?
per_question.answer_text: At Casmaran I work with operational and marine logistic data set Bet The key data points I analyze include voyage ID, vessel ID, route information, distance travelled. OH duration, average vessel speeds, Fuel consumption per voyage Port details and weather and sea condition. The first step was data preparation. I extract the data using SQL and perform cleaning in Excel. By removing duplicate records Handling missing values and standardizing root names. After cleaning I perform exploratory analyze. To understand fuel consumption patterns across different vessels, route and speed range. Using Excel pivot tables and Power BI dashboard I compare Fuel consumption by root, fuel consumption by vessel and fuel consumption बा speed range। The key inside was That vessels operating above certain speed Results were consuming disproportionality higher amount of fuel. Based on this analysis I recommended maintaining vessel Within Optimize Speed Bands and suggested roots levels. Operational Improvement. The comparison indicate approximately 5% reduction in fuel consumption. which translate into improved fuel efficiency and low Lower operational cost.
per_question.develop: linking findings to business outcomes, deeper dive into SQL queries
per_question.fix: quantify the impact of optimized speed bands on fuel efficiency
